prompt: A glowing personal knowledge base feeding into an AI. Layered translucent document cards flowing along light streams into a luminous neural node / context window on the right. Sense of knowledge being read and reused by a machine mind. Dark gradient background, tech / developer aesthetic, conceptual visualization, no text, no letters, no words, no watermark. Cohesive palette: deep indigo, teal, soft cyan glow, subtle warm gold accents.
